description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a slightly worn and aged appearance, featuring a glossy cover with dark brown, beige, and yellowish tones. The cover displays a prominent, partially legible title in large serif font, with some areas appearing smudged or faded. The edges of the book are slightly rounded, and the pages are visible along the sides, showing a creamy, off-white color. The spine is robust and displays similar coloration and text as the front cover, with some creasing and wear. The book's surface has a semi-reflective sheen, suggesting a laminated or glossy finish. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the cover, only text and background coloration.
description: A thick, worn book with a glossy, dark-toned cover and prominent serif title text. The edges and spine show signs of use, and the surface is semi-reflective.
description_view_0: The front cover is most visible, showing the main title text and a glossy, slightly smudged surface.
description_view_1: The spine and part of the front cover are visible, with the title text wrapping around and some wear along the edges.
description_view_2: The back cover and spine are most prominent, with less visible text and more muted coloration.
description_view_3: The bottom and back edge of the book are visible, showing the thickness and the off-white pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown with beige and yellowish highlights, featuring large serif text oriented vertically. There are no decorative elements beyond the text.
